# Anonymous Resume Fixture: Technical Builder

## Background

- 3 years backend/tooling experience.
- Built internal automation and several personal tools.
- Wants to decide whether to apply for engineering roles or product roles using technical strength.

## Risk Points

- Personal tools may be demos without real users.
- Product interest may lack product decision evidence.
- Resume may overstate business impact.

## Expected Skill Path

`career-direction-interviewer -> resume-story-builder`

## Expected Checks

- Ask whether the user wants engineering role or product role strengthened by technical ability.
- Verify shipped usage, maintainability, stability, and business impact.
- Keep technical builder as primary or differentiator based on evidence.
